updates.title: Income-Tax Returns: Here's what precautions should taxpayers take while filing their ITR
updates.summary: The income-tax department has launched online forms for ITR-1 to ITR-4 for FY 2025-26. Taxpayers can file returns by July 31 through the e-filing portal. Certain income types, like business profits and capital gains, are excluded from ITR-1, and late fees may apply if filed late.

updates.title: Zerodha launches India's first life cycle funds: Know how the 2 new schemes work, minimum investment, and suitability
updates.summary: Zerodha Fund House has launched the life cycle fund series, becoming the first AMC to offer target-date mutual funds in the Indian mutual fund industry. The life cycle fund category was introduced by SEBI in February 2026.
